title: Bonsenkitchen Professional Vacuum Sealer Bags, 180 Pcs 20 x 30 cm Vacuum Sealer Bags for All Vacuum Sealer & Food Vacuum Sealer Devices, Boil-Proof and Sous Vide Freezer Bags, BPA-Free, VB33
features: Is Safer - BPA Free: Bonsenkitchen vacuum food storage bags can be microwaved, reused, washed, boiled, and cleaned in the dishwasher. This allows you to precisely control your cooking temperature for perfect results. You can prepare food in vacuum bags by placing them in water with a temperature of up to 90°C (195°F)

Food Grade Vacuum Bags: Bonsenkitchen vacuum sealer wrap feature specially designed channels that remove oxygen, remove oxygen, keep your food fresh and form an airtight barrier that limits taste and spoilage and preserves the original taste of the food

Universal Food Vacuum Bags: Bonsenkitchen 180 bags 20 x 30 cm pre-cut vacuum bags are compatible with all major brand vacuum machines. Our sealing film for vacuum sealer can meet your different requirements for storing food

Long-term Preservation: One side has a groove design and the other side is smooth and transparent. The embossed ventilation vacuum bag maximizes freshness and allows efficient air extraction for better food preservation. Our vacuum bags increase the freshness of your food by up to 6 times
Save Time and Money: Vacuum bags are pre-cut and ready to use. This saves you time when storing leftovers, preparing meals and portioning large amounts of food in the freezer
